common.trigger_behavior_description: The behavior of the targeted entities to trigger on.
common.trigger_threshold_lower_limit_descriptio: The lower limit of the threshold.
common.trigger_threshold_type_description: The type of threshold to use.
common.trigger_threshold_upper_limit_descriptio: The upper limit of the threshold.
common.trigger_unit_description: All values will be converted to this unit when evaluating the trigger.

co2_changed.description: Triggers after one or more carbon dioxide levels change.

above.description: Only trigger when carbon dioxide level is above this value.
